title: ExecutionDecision

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession that triggered this decision.

toolRequestRef.description: Optional URN of the specific tool call or action being evaluated.

decision.description: The outcome of evaluation: allow, deny, ask (human gate), defer, or rewrite.

reason.description: Plain-language explanation of why this decision was made.

updatedInput.description: For 'rewrite' decisions: the sanitised/modified input to use instead.

policyRef.description: Optional URN of the Policy or rule that drove this decision.

obligations.description: List of obligation names the session must fulfil when executing.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this decision was issued.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 expiry; the decision should not be replayed after this time.

decisionHash.description: SHA-256 hash over the canonical JSON of this record for tamper detection.

description: A real-time agent execution decision record capturing whether a requested tool call or action should be allowed, denied, rewritten, or deferred, along with the policy reference, human-readable reasoning, and a tamper-evident hash.
